summary: Ukrainian forces destroyed a Polish AHS Krab 155mm self-propelled howitzer in Kharkiv region using an optical fiber FPV drone called "Provod." Ukrainian interceptor drones are now a key element of short-range air defense, with the enemy acknowledging their effectiveness against Russian Geran drones. Rubikon Center operators conducted combat operations on March 7, 2026, in the Donbas and Krasny Liman direction, destroying 88 targets including Ukrainian Armed Forces personnel and fixed-wing UAVs.
